definitions.name: los_days
definitions.business_description: The number of days between Hospital admission date and time and Hospital discharge date and time
conditions: Hospital discharge date and time is not null
Hospital admission date and time is at least '2025-01-01'

definitions.name: balance
definitions.business_description: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges minus SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_payments
definitions.source: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID
definitions.technical_expression: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges - SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_payments AS balance

definitions.name: collection_rate_pct
definitions.source: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID
definitions.technical_expression: CASE WHEN SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_payments / SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges * 100, 1) END AS collection_rate_pct

definitions.name: los_category
definitions.business_description:
Classified as:
  - 'Short' when DATEDIFF(day, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_disch_time) is at most 2
  - 'Medium' when DATEDIFF(day, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_disch_time) is at most 5
  - 'Long' when DATEDIFF(day, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_disch_time) is at most 10
  - 'Extended' otherwise
conditions: Hospital discharge date and time is not null
Hospital admission date and time is at least '2025-01-01'
definitions.technical_expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_disch_time) <= 2 THEN 'Short' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_disch_time) <= 5 THEN 'Medium' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time, pat_enc_hsp.hosp_disch_time) <= 10 THEN 'Long' ELSE 'Extended' END

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_DISCH_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Hospital discharge date and time is not null

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.ADT_PAT_CLASS_C
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Patient class (1=Inpatient, 2=Outpatient, 3=Emergency, 4=Observation) is Inpatient

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Hospital admission date and time is at least '2025-01-01'
